scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix encounters/backend && npm install --prefix encounters/frontend && npm install --prefix orders/backend && npm install --prefix orders/frontend && npm install --prefix intake-form/with-wizlo/backend && npm install --prefix intake-form/with-wizlo/frontend && npm install --prefix intake-form/without-wizlo/backend && npm install --prefix intake-form/without-wizlo/frontend && npm install --prefix payment/with-wizlo/backend && npm install --prefix payment/with-wizlo/frontend && npm install --prefix payment/without-wizlo/backend && npm install --prefix payment/without-wizlo/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "enc-api,enc-web,ord-api,ord-web,intf-wiz-api,intf-wiz-web,intf-loc-api,intf-loc-web,pay-wiz-api,pay-wiz-web,pay-loc-api,pay-loc-web" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,green,greenBright,yellow,yellowBright,magenta,magentaBright,red,redBright,white,gray" "npm run dev --prefix encounters/backend" "npm run dev --prefix encounters/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix orders/backend" "npm run dev --prefix orders/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix intake-form/with-wizlo/backend" "npm run dev --prefix intake-form/with-wizlo/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix intake-form/without-wizlo/backend" "npm run dev --prefix intake-form/without-wizlo/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix payment/with-wizlo/backend" "npm run dev --prefix payment/with-wizlo/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix payment/without-wizlo/backend" "npm run dev --prefix payment/without-wizlo/frontend"
